title: サトノダイヤモンド登場！

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
A diamond, with unbreakable strength and a
precious luster impossible to tarnish.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
A jewel of countless hopes and expectations.
That is who I am—Satono Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Mother. Father. Please don't look at me with such
sad expressions.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I made it into my top choice school, Tracen
Academy, didn't I? You should be seeing me off
with smiles on your faces! ♪

text_block_list.name: Dia's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're right! Take care of yourself and don't
push yourself too hard, dear.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text:
We're behind you every step of the way, cheering
for you to achieve your dream.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(My only dream is to fulfill the Satono family's
wish...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(To produce an illustrious racer capable of
winning G1 races—that is the Satono family's
ultimate goal and the reason I was born.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(My family rejoiced at my birth and placed their
hopes upon my success. I'm determined to fulfill
their wish.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I swear to make a name for myself
and leave a grand impression in the Twinkle
Series!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I, Dia, will make my family's dream a reality!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (Finally... Finally! The time has come!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond and I set out on her quest to
take on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The date of her debut race is set, so I hurry out to
the track to share the news. But when I get
there...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
It seems you'll be making your debut in the
Twinkle Series this year. How are you feeling
about that?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm extremely excited for the opportunity. I can't
tell you how long I've been waiting for this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find Satono Diamond being interviewed by a
large crowd of reporters.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Have your parents or the Satono Group
commented in regards to your upcoming debut?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Everyone has been very supportive and told
me to give it my all.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
What are your thoughts on a potential first-ever
G1 victory for the Satono Group? I'm sure
everyone has great expectations of you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They do. Naturally, we are all hoping I can
triumph in a G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Then again, every Umamusume aims for
victory. I'll work hard so as not to lose to anyone!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Satono is handling the situation so well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then again, she is no stranger to the spotlight.
Now that it's been decided that she will debut, it's
no surprise people are rushing to interview her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Mejiro McQueen, one of the Umamusume
representing the prestigious Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
She's been interviewed countless times before, so
I'm sure she can handle herself just fine. What
about you, though?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, you'll be expected to comment on
various matters as well. You should be prepared
for when that time comes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing those words makes me feel a little dizzy.
I'm once again reminded of how incredible my
trainee actually is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I first met her, Satono Diamond struck me
as someone far removed from the rest of us
regular folk. And yet, she chose me to be her
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Apologies for keeping you waiting, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I've finished all my interviews!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Why, McQueen, you're here too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes. Congratulations on your upcoming debut.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Thank you very much! I'm honored to
receive congratulations from you. Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Just as you represent the Mejiro family, I, too,
shall do my family proud.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm looking forward to seeing your success.
Well then, if you'll excuse me, I must be going.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if McQueen stopped by just to
congratulate me?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Sigh... She's so kind and thoughtful! I'm always left in awe of her effortless grace!
choice_data_list: She seems to expect great things from you.
She seems to expect great things from you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear Satono Diamond idolizes Mejiro McQueen,
so she must be elated to have been congratulated
by her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can't disappoint McQueen with any subpar
performances! Let's get straight to training!
choice_data_list:
Before that, would you like to know the date of
your debut?

Before that, would you like to know the date of
your debut?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's been decided?!
When? When is it?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... How did I do on that lap?
choice_data_list:
You need to pick up the pace a little in the first
half.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I'm holding back too much... Let me try
one more lap!
Wow! Look at you go, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You seem super motivated today for some
reason. What's up?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: The date of my debut race has been decided!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Seriously?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes! I'm finally at the starting line!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! Yaaay! That's great, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is overjoyed. Apparently, when
they were young, these two made a promise to
run together in the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Last year, before I even became Satono
Diamond's trainer, Kitasan Black made her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Satono Diamond was not showing any
signs of being race-ready at the time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An Umamusume is considered race-ready when
she enters a phase where her running ability
dramatically improves. Before then, she isn't
expected to perform well even if she manages to
debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond chose to hold off on her debut
until she was properly race-ready, rather than
rushing to debut alongside Kitasan Black.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Satono Diamond became race-ready at
last, she teamed up with me. That brings us to the
present.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I can finally... finally chase after you now! My days of watching from the sidelines as you run farther and farther away are finished!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'll be on your heels in no time!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'm not going to let you catch me easily! I'll
be sprinting at full throttle too!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll still catch up with you. I'll catch you, and the
two of us will run in the Twinkle Series together!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm holding you to that! But watch out—I'm
gonna leave you behind if you're too slow!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! You won't have to worry about that.
Isn't that right, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Yep! I'll make sure that doesn't happen!
Yep! I'll make sure that doesn't happen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond—the budding star of the Satono
family—shoulders innumerable hopes and dreams.
And now, my days of making her shine brighter
than anyone have begun in earnest.
